---
title: "Team Onboarding"
---

## Collaboration Goal

Build one shared final-project base with three aligned modules: time series visual analysis, time series clustering, and forecasting.

## Suggested Team Split

1. Member A: Time Series Visual Analysis and common data prep.
2. Member B: Time Series Clustering and clustering module integration.
3. Member C: Forecasting module and forecast evaluation.
4. Member D: Integration, proposal alignment, storyboard, QA, and deployment.

## Branching Convention

1. Create branches as `codex/<module-name>` or `feature/<module-name>`.
2. Keep pull requests scoped to one module or one documentation layer at a time.
3. Merge only after `quarto render` and app smoke tests pass.

## Local Setup

```bash
git clone <repo-url>
cd group_project
quarto preview
Rscript run_app.R 3838
```

## Meeting Records

1. [First Meeting Record](../Meeting%20Minutes/first-meeting-record.html)
2. Add a second meeting record after the instructor-directed pivot to the time-series direction.

## Shared Files to Update Carefully

1. `_quarto.yml` for navigation and build behavior
2. `Proposal/Proposal.qmd` for the shared project narrative
3. `prototype/ui-storyboard.qmd` for the final app design
4. `app/app.R` for module registration
5. `styles/theme.scss` for global styling

## Team Info Cards

::: {.team-grid}
::: {.team-card}
### Member 1
Role: Visual Analysis Owner
Status: add name/contact
:::
::: {.team-card}
### Member 2
Role: Clustering Owner
Status: add name/contact
:::
::: {.team-card}
### Member 3
Role: Forecasting Owner
Status: add name/contact
:::
::: {.team-card}
### Member 4
Role: Integration Owner
Status: add name/contact
:::
:::
